case_title: ENGELHART ELECTRIC CO., INC. vs. H.L.FALK, INC., A BUSINESS ENTITY FORM UNKNOWN et al

OVER PAYMENT OF CHECK (COMPLAINT) DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF ENGELHART ELECTRIC CO., INC.

FILING FEE TAKEN AT TIME OF FILING COMPLAINT WAS $102.OO OVER, PER E. SIMONIAN INSTRUCTIONS, PLAINTIFF ATTY. AGREE TO FILE TO PROTECT STATUE, PARTY INFORMED IF NEED REFUND MUST PREPARE A COURT ORDER FOR REFUND.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-11-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-11-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PLAINTIFF SHALL NOTIFY DEFENDANTS HEARING SET FOR NOV-28-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
